'''Glass Mountain''' was a mountain on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] wherein [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] hid a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] containing priceless treasures. It was guarded by [[Onoh]] but was discovered by [[Milmit]] and [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga]]. [[Gizman|Big Gizz]] and [[Spiker]] hijacked the ship, only to encounter the [[Jabba Tape]].

==Appearances==
*"[[The Jabba Tape]]" {{1st}}
